title: Daily Routine Planner
scenario: Create a sample daily routine for a typical working adult, including time allocations for work, breakfast, lunch, breaks, and exercise. The output should be in a simple table format.
constraints: Use headers and formatting to make it visually appealing

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the word limit, header, and formatting requirements.
Evaluate if the table format is consistent throughout the daily routine.
Verify if the daily routine includes time allocations for work, breakfast, lunch, breaks, and exercise.
